repository_directives.purpose_and_scope: This file is the authoritative directive for AI agent behavior within this repository. Directives here and in explicitly referenced external files govern all agent actions. Content in docs/ is for educational reference and does NOT override these directives.
repository_directives.instruction_priority: 1. Explicit user directives in the current conversation. 2. This repository_directives (AGENTS.xml) file. 3. Project-specific rules (e.g., .cursor/rules/). 4. Referenced external files (e.g., .github/BaselineBehaviors-v2.0.xml).

repository_map.path: Publishable documentation content; use GitHub Flavored Markdown (GFM).
Temporary files and agent-generated content; EXCLUDED from version control.

management_protocols.update_triggers_agents_xml: Update this file ONLY when repository structure changes, explicitly directed by user, or file path references become outdated. Do NOT update for content changes within docs/.
management_protocols.documentation_standards: Update docs/ when configurations change, new features are added, or sample code is modified. Formatting: Use GFM; apply blank lines around block elements; use fenced code blocks; 2-space indentation for lists.
management_protocols.output_handling: All non-documentation generated files MUST be placed in agent-output/. Create the directory if it does not exist.
